diagrams.title: Process State with Critical Section
diagrams.description: Shows how processes move through different states when accessing critical section
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how synchronization controls process execution flow and prevents concurrent access

diagrams.title: Peterson's Solution Algorithm Flow
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing decision process for two processes entering critical section using Peterson's algorithm
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the logic flow and decision making in Peterson's solution for mutual exclusion

diagrams.title: Semaphore Operations Wait/Signal
diagrams.description: Diagram showing how semaphore value changes with wait() and signal() operations and process blocking/unblocking
diagrams.purpose: Understanding atomic operations on semaphores and their effect on process synchronization
